title.en: China-to-Solomon Islands BESS Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入所罗门群岛：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入索羅門群島：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Solomon Islands Solomon Power / SIEA grid-connection and project requirements, IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 international standards, NFPA 855 fire-installation expectations, UN 38.3 and IEC 62281 transport requirements, and the 230/400 V 50 Hz grid context — versus China GB/T 36276, GB/T 34131, GB 38031, and GB/T 36558 baselines. Solomon Islands switched diplomatic recognition to the People's Republic of China in 2019 and is active in Belt and Road Initiative infrastructure, making China-origin BESS supply chains increasingly relevant for Tina River hydro hybrid, solar-plus-storage, and rural electrification projects managed or overseen by Solomon Power (SIEA).
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与所罗门群岛Solomon Power/SIEA并网及项目要求、IEC 62619和IEC 62933国际标准、NFPA 855消防安装预期、UN 38.3和IEC 62281运输要求及230/400 V 50 Hz电网背景——对比中国GB/T 36276、GB/T 34131、GB 38031和GB/T 36558基准的差距对照。所罗门群岛于2019年将外交承认转向中华人民共和国，并积极参与"一带一路"基础设施建设，使中国产地BESS供应链对Solomon Power（SIEA）管理或监督的蒂纳河水电混合、光伏储能及农村电气化项目越来越具有相关性。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與索羅門群島Solomon Power/SIEA併網及項目要求、IEC 62619和IEC 62933國際標準、NFPA 855消防安裝預期、UN 38.3和IEC 62281運輸要求及230/400 V 50 Hz電網背景——對比中國GB/T 36276、GB/T 34131、GB 38031和GB/T 36558基準的差距對照。索羅門群島於2019年將外交承認轉向中華人民共和國，並積極參與「一帶一路」基礎設施建設，使中國產地BESS供應鏈對Solomon Power（SIEA）管理或監督的蒂納河水電混合、光伏儲能及農村電氣化項目越來越具有相關性。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, Solomon Power / SIEA grid-connection approval, fire-safety installation approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. The Solomon Islands has a limited national standards body and a nascent conformity assessment regime — formal mandatory product certification pathways equivalent to those in developed markets do not exist as of the dataset date. Exporters, importers, project developers, and installers should verify current Solomon Power / SIEA technical requirements, applicable donor-funded project specifications, IEC standard evidence requirements, transport regulations, and any host-government approvals with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、Solomon Power / SIEA并网批准、消防安全安装批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。所罗门群岛国家标准机构能力有限，合格评定制度尚处起步阶段——截至本数据集日期，尚不存在与发达市场相当的正式强制产品认证路径。出口商、进口商、项目开发商及安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行Solomon Power / SIEA技术要求、适用捐助资助项目规格、IEC标准证据要求、运输法规及任何东道国政府审批。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、Solomon Power / SIEA併網批准、消防安全安裝批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。索羅門群島國家標準機構能力有限，合格評定制度尚處起步階段——截至本數據集日期，尚不存在與已發展市場相當的正式強制產品認證路徑。出口商、進口商、項目開發商及安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行Solomon Power / SIEA技術要求、適用捐助資助項目規格、IEC標準證據要求、運輸法規及任何東道國政府審批。

answer_first.en: The Solomon Islands does not have a national standards body with mandatory BESS product certification requirements comparable to those in developed markets. Solomon Power (the national utility, also known as SIEA — Solomon Islands Electricity Authority) is the primary technical gatekeeper for grid-connected BESS projects. The practical gaps for Chinese BESS exported to the Solomon Islands are: (1) IEC 62619 cell and module safety evidence — internationally expected by project owners, donors (World Bank, ADB, SPC, JICA), and Solomon Power in project specifications; (2) IEC 62933 system-level requirements where referenced in Solomon Power or donor-funded project agreements; (3) NFPA 855-aligned fire-safety design documentation, as the Solomon Islands follows a broadly IEC/Australian-influenced legacy with NFPA referenced in international project practice; (4) UN 38.3 transport documentation, mandatory under international conventions for sea freight via Honiara port; (5) grid voltage difference — Solomon Islands operates at 230/400 V 50 Hz whereas China's nominal is 220/380 V 50 Hz; PCS must be re-parameterised for 230/400 V despite the shared 50 Hz frequency; and (6) tropical derating — high humidity, cyclone risk, and salt-mist corrosion in the Solomon Islands demand enclosure ingress protection, anti-corrosion materials, and environmental derating beyond Chinese standard specifications. Chinese GB/T 36276, GB/T 34131, GB 38031, and GB/T 36558 certificates are not accepted as substitutes for IEC 62619 evidence in project or donor review.
answer_first.zh: 所罗门群岛尚无与发达市场相当的具有BESS产品强制认证要求的国家标准机构。Solomon Power（国家电力公司，又称SIEA——所罗门群岛电力局）是并网BESS项目的主要技术把关方。中国BESS出口所罗门群岛的实际差距包括：（1）IEC 62619电芯和模组安全证据——项目业主、捐助方（世界银行、亚洲开发银行、SPC、JICA）及Solomon Power在项目规格中的国际预期；（2）Solomon Power或捐助方资助项目协议中引用的IEC 62933系统级要求；（3）符合NFPA 855的消防安全设计文件，因所罗门群岛延续IEC/澳大利亚影响的传统，国际项目实践中引用NFPA；（4）UN 38.3运输文件，依据国际公约对经霍尼亚拉港海运强制要求；（5）电网电压差异——所罗门群岛电网为230/400 V 50 Hz，而中国名义电压为220/380 V 50 Hz；尽管共用50 Hz频率，PCS仍须重新针对230/400 V进行参数配置；（6）热带降额——所罗门群岛高湿度、飓风风险和盐雾腐蚀要求外壳防护等级、防腐材料及超出中国标准规格的环境降额。中国GB/T 36276、GB/T 34131、GB 38031和GB/T 36558证书不被接受为项目或捐助方审查中IEC 62619证据的替代依据。
answer_first.zht: 索羅門群島尚無與已發展市場相當的具有BESS產品強制認證要求的國家標準機構。Solomon Power（國家電力公司，又稱SIEA——索羅門群島電力局）是併網BESS項目的主要技術把關方。中國BESS出口索羅門群島的實際差距包括：（1）IEC 62619電芯和模組安全證據——項目業主、捐助方（世界銀行、亞洲開發銀行、SPC、JICA）及Solomon Power在項目規格中的國際預期；（2）Solomon Power或捐助方資助項目協議中引用的IEC 62933系統級要求；（3）符合NFPA 855的消防安全設計文件，因索羅門群島延續IEC/澳大利亞影響的傳統，國際項目實踐中引用NFPA；（4）UN 38.3運輸文件，依據國際公約對經霍尼亞拉港海運強制要求；（5）電網電壓差異——索羅門群島電網為230/400 V 50 Hz，而中國名義電壓為220/380 V 50 Hz；儘管共用50 Hz頻率，PCS仍須重新針對230/400 V進行參數配置；（6）熱帶降額——索羅門群島高濕度、颶風風險和鹽霧腐蝕要求外殼防護等級、防腐材料及超出中國標準規格的環境降額。中國GB/T 36276、GB/T 34131、GB 38031和GB/T 36558證書不被接受為項目或捐助方審查中IEC 62619證據的替代依據。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
